privateInvite_afterDecline_userNotInvited() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.QRandPrivateinviteUnitTest
US 01.05.07 Simulates declining a private invite — removes eventID from invitedEvents.
privateInvite_afterInvite_userIsInvited() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.QRandPrivateinviteUnitTest
US 01.05.07 Simulates the inviteUser logic from PrivateInviteActivity: appends eventID to invitedEvents string, then checks isInvited().
privateInvite_declineOne_doesNotAffectOther() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.QRandPrivateinviteUnitTest
US 01.05.07 Verifies that declining one event does not affect invitation to another.
privateInvite_invitingTwice_doesNotDuplicate() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.QRandPrivateinviteUnitTest
US 01.05.07 Verifies that inviting the same user twice does not duplicate the eventID.
privateInvite_userNotInvitedByDefault() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.QRandPrivateinviteUnitTest
US 01.05.07 Calls user.isInvited() before any invite — should be false.
PrivateInviteActivity - Class in com.example.junimoapp.Organizer
US 02.01.03 Allows an organizer to invite specific entrants to a private event's waiting list by searching via name, phone number, and/or email.
